hero.subline: Computer Science graduate and part-time instructor with experience teaching programming, logic, and introductory AI topics for school and university learners.

items.a: The coach can teach logic and thinking skills, algorithms and data structures, OOP, design patterns, Git/GitHub, Java, game-oriented learning, and introductory machine learning and computer vision topics.
This coach is suitable for school learners across multiple age groups as well as university students in introductory and foundational computing tracks.

items.q: Is the coach available online or offline?
items.a: The coach is available in a hybrid format through Coach Academy, depending on scheduling and program needs.
Use the WhatsApp button on this page.

footer.blurb: Empowering talent through hands-on, outcome-driven technical coaching.
